content:
🚨 Big Update for CA Students!

ICAI has invited public comments on the proposed revision of the minimum stipend for articled assistants. If implemented, this could be one of the biggest stipend revisions in recent years.

For many students, this is a welcome step. But an important question remains...

💭 Is the proposed stipend enough in today's time?

Considering rising living costs, travel expenses, and the workload during articleship:

👍 YES – The proposed hike is fair.

❤️ NO – The stipend should be increased further.

👇 Comment only one word: YES or NO and share your reason.

Let's see what the CA community thinks!

♻️ Repost this so more CA students and professionals can join the discussion.
